form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Mix 2/3 on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Keylin beaten 3 lengths (18.01). Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Mix 2/3 on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Keylin beaten 3 lengths (18.01). Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on the heels and lost momentum rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 300m at Casino behind Hi Ellen beaten 5 lengths (17.49). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 300m at Casino behind Hi Ellen beaten 5 lengths (17.49). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond over 320m. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond over 320m. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on January 24 at this track over 300m. Last start was third over 300m in 17.58, behind Golden Sunset. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Working her way into winning form after her success on January 24 at this track over 300m. Last start was third over 300m in 17.58, behind Golden Sunset. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth in a Grade 5 on March 25 over 300m at this track behind Spin Around Blue, beaten 11 lengths (18.40). Can't recommend in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished eighth in a Grade 5 on March 25 over 300m at this track behind Spin Around Blue, beaten 11 lengths (18.40). Can't recommend in this field.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to post a big 7 lengths win at this track over 300m (17.30) beating Watch Her Win in Grade 4 on April 11. In form but prefer to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance to post a big 7 lengths win at this track over 300m (17.30) beating Watch Her Win in Grade 4 on April 11. In form but prefer to watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Whilst leading through the home turn, was contacted and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time when fourth (18.24) at this track. Prior to that had been racing well. Drawn out wide and needs to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time when fourth (18.24) at this track. Prior to that had been racing well. Drawn out wide and needs to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked out across heels and lost ground rounding the first turn.
Shifted in at the start, bumped the hindquarters and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at this track on April 11 over 300m in 17.44. Has run a slick time here with a 17.4 PB at the distance. Worth including.
